DisplayDescription:
Ready to set a new personal best with Wildstar Racing Amateur League?

A sprawling network of interworking cranes, pipes, and industrial machinery line the winding quarry of this active worksite that doubles as the Lorville Outskirts racetrack.

This racetrack was first popularized by the XGR Racing Team.

RACE DETAILS
* LOCATION: Hurston
* LENGTH: 22.8 km
* FEATURES: Sharp Turns
